name: @onsite/core
description: Portable, dependency-free domain engines for OnSite (pricing, schedule, while-here, radar, intake, contract-scope, geodesic). Pure functions, no DOM/storage/globals. The doc-55 migration's reusable core + eval harness.
comment: No runtime deps. Tests use Node's built-in node:test (zero install). PROD upgrade path: author in TS + tsup/vitest once a build step is acceptable (see CORE-EXTRACTION.md).
